export class WantedListParser{constructor(){this._data=[];}flush(){this._data=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();const list=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const userId=wrapper.readInt();const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const wantedLevel=wrapper.readInt();// ✅ matches composer: maxRemainingSeconds
const maxRemainingSeconds=wrapper.readInt();// ✅ matches composer: charges list size + strings
const chargesCount=wrapper.readInt();const chargesList=[];for(let c=0;c<chargesCount;c++){const chargeName=wrapper.readString();if(chargeName&&chargeName.trim().length)chargesList.push(chargeName.trim());}list.push({userId,username,figure,wantedLevel,maxRemainingSeconds:Math.max(0,maxRemainingSeconds),chargesList});}this._data=list;// 🔥 Broadcast event so UI updates immediately
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wanted_list_update',{detail:this._data}));return true;}getWantedUsers(){return this._data;}}
